## Summary

Describe the outcome and why it belongs in Open Northland.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] I ran any additional pipeline, browser, visual, or audio checks required by this change.

## Source and asset check

- [ ] This change contains no original or decoded game data.
- [ ] New format or fidelity decisions state their source basis and name any approximation.
- [ ] New binary files are project-owned, documented, and included in the repository asset allowlist.
